adopted_roadmap.fase_ii_summary: 3 DGs shipped + 3 Baselines PASS validated: DG-127 A (signature attachment) H3-implicit-con-verdict-shift Baseline-11 INC→FP; DG-128 A (body scan taint propagation) H3-implicit-refinement Baseline-12 categorical FP; DG-129 A (module trust boundary tagging) H3-STRUCTURAL-SHIFT Baseline-13 FP→INC. Cumulative achievement: North Star principle empíricamente REALIZED — el LLM ahora razona sobre findings cross-module con contexto de signature + body content + attack surface. Duration real: 3 días vs estimate 3-4 semanas.
adopted_roadmap.current_phase_progress: 1/3 DGs shipped (DG-130 A Sub-A2 IMPLEMENTED pending Baseline-14 validation). FASE III cubre: DG-130 A per-fingerprint verdict persistence + reproducibilidad cross-provider (backlog #4), DG-131 A R20 cross-finding correlation (Stage 3 groups), DG-132 A R22 diff-aware mode.

activeDG.title: Per-fingerprint verdict persistence + reproducibilidad cross-provider — primer DG de FASE III 'trust cross-session' — Sub-A2 Balanced IMPLEMENTED
activeDG.deliverables_summary: Schema v6 verdict_history append-only table + TriageVerdictHistoryRecord type + colony-db helpers (insertVerdictHistoryBatch + getVerdictHistoryForFingerprint + getVerdictHistoryByFingerprints + getVerdictDiffAgainstPrevious) + triage.ts insert history + diff-aware line + reporters/tomo.ts scanDiff/previouslyVerdicts enrichment + extension schema + webview banner Verdict changed + Previously section + summary scan-diff line + show.ts + scan.ts pass enrichment + 17 tests (6 colony-db + 3 tomo + 8 webview) + version bump 0.3.17 → 0.3.18. INVARIANTE: clearTriageDataForFingerprints NO borra verdict_history (verified con test dedicado).
activeDG.acceptance_empirica_a_medir_baseline_14: REINSTALL CLEAN + SENTINEL regression + SYNAPTIC_SAAS Baseline-14 primer scan (verdict_history INSERT, no Previously section) + Baseline-14b re-triage (verdict_history NUEVO INSERT, Previously section visible con 1 prior verdict, banner Verdict changed si classification difiere). Terminal debe emit 'Scan diff vs previous triage: N new · M re-classified · K unchanged'. Sidebar summary debe mostrar scan-diff line.
